Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-07-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DEALSPIN, INC.'S ATTY'S (David M. Helbraun, Esq. of Helbraun Law Firm) Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel:
APPEARANCE: David M. Helbraun, Esq. of Helbraun Law Firm 982-4000 moving to withdraw as attorney of record for deft Dealspin, Inc.; no other appearances.
RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission & will issue an order after 09/19/03 (CMC set for 09/19 in dept. 212; counsel to appear at 212 hearing & request matter be put over for 60 days (to allow deft time to obtain new counsel)). (302/REQ/ju) Court Reporter Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
